overview.description: The iShares Strategic Metals ETF (ISTM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad market commodities. The fund tracks an index of exchange-traded strategic metals futures contracts. These metals are considered essential to key structural themes, including AI infrastructure, manufacturing, energy production and distribution, and national security. ISTM was launched on Sep 26, 2023 and is issued by BlackRock.
